title: Suspension effective as to all minerals
doc_html:
§100.  Suspension effective as to all minerals

An obstacle to production of any mineral covered by an act creating a mineral royalty suspends the running of prescription as to all minerals covered by the act.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §100, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§100.  Suspension effective as to all minerals
An obstacle to production of any mineral covered by an act creating a mineral royalty suspends the running of prescription as to all minerals covered by the act.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §100, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
